title: ajuga vulgaris subsp. pyramidalis
intro: Ajuga vulgaris subsp. pyramidalis, also known as Bugle or Bugleweed, is a perennial flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Bugleweed include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce anxiety and insomnia, and act as a diuretic. Bugleweed can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a popular choice for those seeking natural remedies for various health issues.
